data.ogTitle: GitHub · Change is constant. GitHub keeps you ahead.
data.ogDescription: Join the world's most widely adopted, AI-powered developer platform where millions of developers, businesses, and the largest open source community build software that advances humanity.

issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Multiple H1s confuse search engines about your page's main topic.
issues.fix: Use only one H1 per page. Use H2-H6 for subheadings.

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

issues.impact: Missing out on rich snippets (star ratings, prices, availability) in search results.
issues.fix: Add schema.org JSON-LD markup for products, reviews, FAQs, or local business

summary: We analyzed github.com and found 5 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
